title: King Royalty now accepts loyalty!
summary: King Royalty eggs now has exclusive loyalty discounts and rewards you can't miss.
body: That's right - King Royalty eggs, as of today, now has exclusive loyalty discounts and rewards you can't miss. Unlock limited rewards such as:
Unlock your deals on the King Royalty website today!
howToUnlock: You'll immediently receive your loyalty point after successful purchase!
note: Note: points vary by device and do not sync between devices.
howToRedeem: Go to https://kingroyaltyeggs.com/loyalty on the same computer you bought the eggs
Choose your reward to redeem and copy the code
footer:
You can now redeem your reward at checkout by selecting add promotion code and pasting your code!

Thanks for your cooperation;

Matthew Anderson

King Royalty team
